reply: 把架构、写码、审查、测试拆给不同模型，比单模型硬扛靠谱。难点会落在交接格式和失败重跑。

review.notes: 回应多模型协作、架构/写码/review/测试分工；不泛泛夸工具。

reply: The month-end close template is the most practical one. Finance teams will trust these only when evidence trails and permissions are clear.

review.notes: English source; concrete to finance templates and month-end close.

reply: 每会话沙箱和凭证隔离这两点很实用。团队要放心用，先得知道谁能碰哪些文件和密钥。

review.notes: 回应 open-source workspace agents 的 sandbox 与 credential isolation。

reply: Mac 上能看屏幕、点鼠标、打字，这一步很大。以后限制不在写不写代码，而在授权边界怎么收住。

review.notes: 回应 Codex on Mac 的 computer-use 能力，落到授权边界。

reply: The interesting part is not picking one coding agent forever. It is letting task trackers route work while humans stay on review and direction.

review.notes: English source; responds to Symphony/Multica and task tracker routing.

reply: Autopilot sounds easy until exceptions show up. Production agents need handoff rules as much as task automation.

review.notes: English source; responds to production AI agents and autopilot framing.

reply: Persistent computers are the missing piece for me too. Chat is too temporary when the work spans files, tools, and history.

review.notes: English source; concrete to persistent computer vs chat.

reply: MATLAB 直接接本地工程环境，对科研和仿真很有用。最怕的不是不会算，而是上下文和文件链路断掉。

review.notes: 回应 MATLAB Agentic Toolkit 对本地工程环境的价值。

reply: 终端能访问网页后，很多资料收集任务就顺了。最该省的是来回复制链接和整理结果的时间。

review.notes: 回应 TinyFish CLI 让终端 agent 访问网页。

reply: The cheap-versus-expensive model split is underrated. Token savings matter most when the rules are written into the repo.

review.notes: English source; concrete to Claude Code token usage and model routing.

reply: iOS agents plus App Store Connect CLI is a practical combo. The boring release steps are exactly where automation saves attention.

review.notes: English source; replies to Swift News topics and developer workflow.

reply: The control tower piece matters more than the demo. Enterprises need to see approval paths before they let agents execute work.

review.notes: English source; responds to AI Control Tower and enterprise governance.

reply: DESIGN.md 如果能把 token 和 rationale 放在同一份文件里，设计交接会少很多猜测。

review.notes: 回应 DESIGN.md 的机器层和人类可读 rationale。

reply: Agreed. Design should probably be a mode inside the main assistant, not another place to move context into.

review.notes: English source; responds to Claude Design should be inside main Claude/Codex.

reply: App 形态确实降低门槛。普通人不想先学终端，能从角色和常用应用开始，会更容易持续用。

review.notes: 回应 Codex app 形态降低上手门槛。

reply: 500 个案例比单个教程有用。新手最缺的不是概念，而是知道同一套能力能落在哪些行业。

review.notes: 回应 500+ agents 应用场景合集。

reply: Phone access changes the usage pattern. If the remote computer keeps state, quick iMessage nudges become enough for real work.

review.notes: English source; replies to remote computer controlled from phone/laptop.

reply: Finance templates make more sense for SMBs than generic chat. The ROI is easiest to see when a monthly process gets shorter.

review.notes: English source; responds to Claude finance templates and SMB savings.

reply: Direct scene access is a big deal. Game agents become much more useful when they can touch the editor, not just write files beside it.

review.notes: English source; replies to Unity workflow and scene access.

reply: The pricing shift is real. If the $20 plan covers normal dev usage, the switching cost gets much easier to justify.

review.notes: English source; replies to Codex pricing vs Claude Code.

reply: Harness quality matters more than model branding here. A cheap model with the right loop can beat an expensive model used badly.

review.notes: English source; responds to harness fix and model comparison.

reply: 企业里最难的是把文档、表格和业务应用接到一起。入口统一后，权限和审计就必须一起补上。

review.notes: 回应 Gemini Enterprise 连接文档、数据和应用。

reply: 把岗位写成可复用角色很有价值。下一步不是角色越多越好，而是每个角色有清楚输入和验收标准。

review.notes: 回应岗位变成 AI 员工和角色库。

reply: 金融研究助手如果能自己抓资料、列假设、再做自检，会比普通问答强很多。核心还是别让它直接替人拍板。

review.notes: 回应金融研究 agent 的自主研究和自我验证。

reply: 投研里 supervisor 这层很合理。多个子任务并行跑时，必须有人负责合并证据和指出冲突。

review.notes: 回应 JP Morgan Ask David 的 supervisor agent 架构。

reply: 前端和设计类 skills 最适合沉淀成清单。每次都重新解释审美要求，太浪费上下文。

review.notes: 回应前端/产品/UI 的 Agent Skills 推荐。

reply: Local routines are the right direction. The routine should live near the repo and tools, not only inside one vendor account.

review.notes: English source; responds to local routines with any agent.

reply: 把多个编码工具放进一个原生 Mac 应用挺顺手。最省事的地方是不用在终端、浏览器、编辑器之间来回跳。

review.notes: 回应 Superconductor 原生 Mac agent 聚合。

reply: /goal 适配模型这件事挺有意思。很多迁移不是换入口，而是把旧习惯和工具调用兼容好。

review.notes: 回应 Codex /goal 适配 GPT-5.5 到 Claude Code。

reply: Secret handling is the part most demos skip. The agent can write code, but the environment still needs hard boundaries around credentials.

review.notes: English source; responds to Anthropic CISO and .env/secret handling.

reply: 一边读源码一边比工程实践，是学 harness 最快的方式。只看教程很难理解那些奇怪边界从哪来。

review.notes: 回应 Claude Code 与 Codex harness 工程实践对比。

reply: 把 repo 做成知识图谱很对。改代码前先知道调用链和影响范围，比事后靠测试猜错在哪里稳多了。

review.notes: 回应 GitNexus 代码库知识图谱和 MCP 接入。

reply: Image-to-game is a great stress test. It forces the pipeline to handle assets, animation, and playable feedback, not just a pretty screenshot.

review.notes: English source; replies to GPT Image to Codex browser game workflow.

reply: 24 小时电台主播这个方向很有温度。歌单、日程和声音都接上，才不像一个单纯播放器。

review.notes: 回应音乐电台 Agent Claudio 的歌单、日程、声音。

reply: 一个人管 40 家公司听着夸张，但演示里最该看的是任务分派、复盘和异常处理怎么做。

review.notes: 回应 Andrew Wilkinson 管 40+ 公司和 agent 演示。

reply: 手机端查看进度和插话很实用。长任务跑着的时候，人不应该被绑在电脑前等结果。

review.notes: 回应 Happy Coder 让手机查看 Claude Code/Codex 进度。

reply: This is why destructive actions need a separate approval rail. Speed is great until the agent can call a production API in one step.

review.notes: English source; responds to production DB deletion by an agent.

reply: 设计还原度做到 95% 很吸引人。更想看的是它面对真实品牌约束时，能不能稳定保持风格。

review.notes: 回应 open claude design 的高还原度和设计系统。

reply: Finance is a good vertical for templates because the work is repetitive but evidence-heavy. The audit trail has to be part of the product.

review.notes: English source; replies to Claude financial services templates.

reply: 图形界面、命令行、IDE 都覆盖，对新手很友好。入门教程最重要的是少掉第一小时的挫败感。

review.notes: 回应 Codex 喂饭级入门教程覆盖多入口。

reply: The services layer is underrated. Enterprise agents still need integration, data access, and change management around the model.

review.notes: English source; responds to vertical agents and services/SI layer.

reply: Daily operating systems is the right frame. The prize is not another chatbot; it is becoming part of how work gets assigned and checked.

review.notes: English source; replies to embedding AI into daily operating systems.

reply: The one markdown file part is underrated. Most people need a small starting loop, not a six-month platform project.

review.notes: English source; replies to life agent built with one markdown file.

reply: Multi-player is the hard part. If no one knows why a rule changed, the AI rollout becomes another undocumented system.

review.notes: English source; responds to AI single-player problem and enterprise workflows.

reply: 100 美元档看起来像是给高频使用者补中间层。Plus 不够、Pro 太贵的人确实会犹豫。

review.notes: 回应 OpenAI 新 Pro tier 与 Codex 用量。

reply: Governance plus real-time data is the useful combination. Without both, automation either gets stuck or becomes risky.

review.notes: English source; replies to UiPath, Databricks, governance and data access.

reply: 视觉生产和变现都做成原生 skills 后，本地助手就不只是写字了。重点是输出能不能进真实交付。

review.notes: 回应 Hermes 原生 Skills 扩展到视觉生产与商业变现。

reply: 3 个文件拉起多智能体团队很诱人。落地时我会先看工具权限、任务日志和失败重跑。

review.notes: 回应 Google Cloud/Anthropic ADK、MCP、A2A。

reply: 从不会开终端到搭出全平台内容流程，这条路径很有参考价值。最难的是把每一步留下来复用。

review.notes: 回应非程序员用 Claude+Cursor 搭内容 workflow。

reply: Node graphs make sense for video because every team wants repeatable variants. The value is reusing the pipeline without flattening creativity.

review.notes: English source; replies to node graph video pipeline.
